description.summary: Create professional diagrams from hierarchical text in LibreOffice Impress
description.description: LibreImpress SmartArt is a UNO extension for LibreOffice Impress that enables users to quickly create structured diagrams from hierarchical text input. Supports multiple diagram types including hierarchy, hub-and-spoke, and process flow layouts.
description.license-text: This extension is provided as-is for use with LibreOffice Impress.
description.release-notes: Initial release - Phase 1: Empty OXT foundation
